name: International Space Station
description: Humanity's permanent home in orbit. 420 tonnes, 109-metre wingspan. Built by 16 nations across 42 flights. Has hosted 273 people from 21 countries. Visible to the naked eye from Earth — the brightest object in the night sky after the Moon and Venus.
scale_fact: The ISS orbits at 408 km. You could drive there in 4 hours at motorway speed. It feels impossibly far — it is impossibly close.
